hypothesis: An earth-mover’s-distance computed on formation energies predicted by an ensemble ML surrogate that is calibrated via Δ‑learning using only 1% randomly sampled DFT-relaxed structures will correlate with the DFT-based SUN stability fraction (energy-above-hull ≤ 0.1 eV/atom) with Pearson r ≥ 0.8 across generated sets from CDVAE, GemsDiff, and DiffCSP while using ≤5% of the DFT compute budget required to calculate SUN directly.
